steps.description: Open the ShoppersStack sign-in page
Capture initial state of the sign-in page
Check for JavaScript console errors on page load
Measure page load time and TTFB for the sign-in page
Verify URL contains user-signin path
Assert ShoppersStack brand or sign-in related text is present
Verify heading hierarchy (H1/H2) on the sign-in page
Scroll down to reveal any hidden form elements or footer content
Capture page after scroll to check full layout
Assert email/username input field is visible on the page
Assert password input field is visible on the page
Assert the login/sign-in submit button is visible
FUNCTIONAL - Submit empty login form to trigger validation errors
FUNCTIONAL - Verify validation error messages appear for empty form
Capture validation error state after empty form submission
FUNCTIONAL - Type invalid email format into email field
FUNCTIONAL - Type a short/invalid password into password field
FUNCTIONAL - Click submit button with invalid credentials
FUNCTIONAL - Verify error message appears for invalid credentials
Capture error state for invalid credential attempt
FUNCTIONAL - Fill login form with valid test credentials and submit
Capture state after positive login attempt
INTEGRATION - Check ShoppersStack main API/homepage returns 2xx
INTEGRATION - Verify the sign-in endpoint itself returns 2xx
SYSTEM E2E - Navigate back to sign-in page to begin full user journey
SYSTEM E2E - Confirm user is on the sign-in page to start the journey
SYSTEM E2E - Hover over the sign-in button to check interactivity/tooltip
SYSTEM E2E - Capture hover state on the sign-in button
REGRESSION - Validate all links on the page return valid responses
REGRESSION - Final state screenshot for regression baseline comparison
